[2021-01-06 23:03] megasupp (mega-supp): I honestly don't really like ls on pivot makes it less elegant
[2021-01-06 23:09] cooledcannon: what was reasoning for ls
[2021-01-06 23:11] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): So it doesn't clutter the board for the entire game when it isn't relevant, and that p1 doesn't need help with green if they pick up mid-/late-game conduits like they do for early-game conduits
[2021-01-06 23:12] megasupp (mega-supp): I think ppl didn't like that you can buy conduit just for forcefields and get extra green
[2021-01-06 23:12] megasupp (mega-supp): But I don't really mind that

[2021-01-07 23:59] xyotsuba: About galvani: I think the main part of your argument is  about the diversity of sets it brings. Ultra fast  rush and galv antima don’t exist without glavani. Plus it is the only drone that is an ongoing energy sink, which is interesting.

I don’t think bt2 galvani is going to stop it from allowing those kind of sets. But it will hopefully make them fun for both players instead of just one. 

Galvani will still be bought every game and it will still change the way sets play out and allow sets that wouldn’t exist without it. 
I think it’s worth testing at least. Even if it is the unit with the highest player satisfaction, it can still be improved. If that’s the case, it will just have a very high hurdle to clear testing and not be reverted.

--- Thread (1 messages, 2021-01-08) ---
[2021-01-08 00:14] xyotsuba: About engi + galv transposing with drone, I think you are really overrating this. You could make an attacker that costs the same as drone and then say “wow a little change makes so much difference.” We don’t do that because it would be broken. Well galvani is broken so we should fix it.

I think you give new players too little credit. They don’t need to see that galvani + engi costs the same as drone to try using it. Once they use it they will realize it’s better. If you REALLY want an “aha” moment, there is still that galvani + engi costs the same as drone but with 1 build time. There is currently no drone that has the relationship tarsier has with grimbotch/vore. The player can say, “well galvani + engi is like tarsier, which is worse than vore/botch at attacking because of buildtime. So galvani must be worse than drone.”
Then they will make an “aha” when they realize it’s better anyway when u have excess energy.

Losing frontline is fine because we have tons of frontline units.
